name: Bucharest (Romania)
description: A yellow (gold) field bearing the coat of arms of Bucharest in the centre — the figure of Saint Demetrius (Sfântul Dumitru), the city's patron saint.
history: Bucharest is the capital and largest city of Romania. The city's patron is Saint Demetrius the New, depicted in the city arms.

features.role: Coat of arms of Bucharest (Saint Demetrius)
